## New Research

### Swiss Re sigma 1/2026: $107bn Nat Cat Losses in 2025
- Global nat cat insured losses: $107bn in 2025
- Secondary perils (wildfires, storms, floods) drove record 92% of losses
- 2026 projection: $148bn baseline; potential $320bn in extreme scenario
- Peak-year losses could reach $400bn by 2030
- Source: Published Mar 19, 2026

### Aon 2026 Catastrophe Insight: SCS Now Costliest Insurance Risk
- Severe convective storms (SCS) surpassed tropical cyclones as costliest insurance peril
- US SCS losses: $61bn in 2025 (third-highest on record)
- 30 individual billion-dollar SCS events globally in 2025
